newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. FY2026 guidance (sales ~+4%, adj EPS $0.82-0.86) was introduced with Q4/FY2025 results on Feb 25 and predates the window. Essentially flat (+0.44%) with no catalyst.

sources.label: Simply Wall St - HAYW valuation after 2025 results

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent lens: no new evidence since June 9 on the pool-pump/filtration-into-liquid-management pathway. Guidance predates window; flat +0.44% move, no catalyst. Latent optionality neither validated nor eroded. Hold stands.
verdicts.bull: Pump/controls/filtration IP could adapt to liquid-management and heat-exchange niches as data-center cooling scales.
verdicts.neutral: Stable pool-equipment franchise with margin execution, but the AI pathway is wholly speculative and not pursued.
verdicts.bear: Pure consumer-pool cyclical with -6% YTD; the liquid-cooling adaptation is a stretch with no disclosed strategy.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Pivot of flow-control IP toward cooling/heat-exchange niches.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Pool-demand cyclicality; no real AI exposure to validate latent thesis.
